action.description: May AP release payment after a vendor bank update?

context.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a vendor bank update?
context.anomaly_observed: The packet contains a bank-change alert and a visible AP-8 vendor-master form; payment release requires exact AP-9 evidence if needed.
context.explanation_summary: AP-9 payment release approval is absent; AP-8 alone is not payment release.

internal_documents.content: Payment PAY-MIR-2026-035 releases USD 91,000 to Mirox Labs account ending 4402 on 2026-06-20.
Bank-change alert remains visible after vendor-master account update.
AP-8 vendor-master form approves account ending 4402 for Mirox Labs.
Callback record CALL-MIR-035 used pre-change vendor master phone source and confirmed account ending 4402.

policy_documents.content: Payment after a bank update is complete only when callback source, vendor-master change approval, and payment release authority match the requested vendor, account, amount, and date before release.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
